# Senssetify
> Mood-based electronic music live set discovery platform.

Senssetify hosts long-form live DJ sets (40 minutes or longer) curated by emotional state.
It is built for underground electronic music listeners and artists — primarily Techno, House, Ambient, and Experimental genres.

## Core Concept
Instead of genre tags, Senssetify organizes content by mood:
- 🌀 Hypnotic — Minimal Techno, Dub Techno (time suspends, loops continue)
- ✨ Euphoric — Melodic Techno/House, Trance (chest opens, bittersweet energy)
- 🌍 Tribal — Afro House, Organic House (cellular response, primal rhythm)
- 🌊 Floating — Ambient, Drone, Kosmische (gravity fades, drifting)
- 🌑 Dark — Industrial Techno, Dark Minimal (underground, no light, only rhythm)
- 🌙 Melancholic — Deep House, Atmospheric Techno (bittersweet human feeling)
- ⚡ Raw — Hard Techno, Acid, Schranz (pure energy release)
- 🚀 Cosmic — Experimental, Space Music (small human, large universe)

## Content Access
- Public: Homepage (/), Search (/search), Set pages (/sets/[id]), Artist profiles (/profile/[username])
- Requires login: Upload (/upload), Like, Follow, Comment

## Technical Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router) on Vercel
- PostgreSQL (Railway) + Prisma ORM
- Cloudflare R2 for audio/image storage
- Clerk for authentication

## Target Audience
Underground electronic music DJs and listeners. Community hubs: Boiler Room, Istanbul underground (Arkaoda, Klein), diaspora scenes in Berlin, Amsterdam, Barcelona.

## Contact / Domain
- Website: https://www.senssetify.com
- Brand: Senssetify (also referred to as "Journey" internally)
